variants: Nina Makiri has made a name for herself in Actuarial Science, showcasing her expertise through the creation of the Windveil Compass Model, a notable innovation that has enhanced navigational methods in various sectors. Nina also engages in her passion for music as a dedicated member of the Dewgrass Jazz Circle, where she finds joy among fellow enthusiasts. Throughout her development, mentor Luna Kim played a crucial role, offering support and guidance during her educational journey.
